steps.t: You should return to Dáin and inform him that you did indeed feel the presence of the Balrog inside the gates of Moria.
Sit before Dáin and listen to the story of Nafni the Unslain.
Dáin has begun to tell the story of Nafni the Unslain. You should talk to Dáin to hear his story.
Complete 'The Fall of Khazad-dûm' on any difficulty. Use the Instance Finder to enter this instance.
Dáin has just about finished his story. You should talk to Dáin to hear the ending.
